'''sanolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scallion|scallion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scallion|scallion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sanolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæneleth|sæneleth]] || [[word:sænelej|sænelej]] || [[word:sænelesh|sænelesh]] || [[word:sænele|sænele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sanonoloth|sanonoloth]] || [[word:sanonoloj|sanonoloj]] || [[word:sanonolosh|sanonolosh]] || [[word:sanonolo|sanonolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanoloth|sanoloth]] || [[word:sanoloj|sanoloj]] || [[word:sanolosh|sanolosh]] || [[word:sanolo|sanolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanofloth|sanofloth]] || [[word:sanofloj|sanofloj]] || [[word:sanoflosh|sanoflosh]] || [[word:sanoflof|sanoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanolotho|sanolotho]] || [[word:sanolojo|sanolojo]] || [[word:sanolosho|sanolosho]] || [[word:sanoloko|sanoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanoloth|sanoloth]] || [[word:sanoloj|sanoloj]] || [[word:sanolosh|sanolosh]] || [[word:sanolo|sanolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanolothol|sanolothol]] || [[word:sanolojol|sanolojol]] || [[word:sanoloshol|sanoloshol]] || [[word:sanolokol|sanolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanolothotho|sanolothotho]] || [[word:sanolojojo|sanolojojo]] || [[word:sanoloshosho|sanoloshosho]] || [[word:sanoloko|sanoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanolothon|sanolothon]] || [[word:sanolojon|sanolojon]] || [[word:sanoloshon|sanoloshon]] || [[word:sanolokon|sanolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanolothoro|sanolothoro]] || [[word:sanolojoro|sanolojoro]] || [[word:sanoloshoro|sanoloshoro]] || [[word:sanolokoro|sanolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
